Water Sprinkler of Nem Ankh  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Lore Group: Cleric Epic Weapons
Slot: PRIMARY
Charges: Unlimited
Skill: 1H Blunt Atk Delay: 32
DMG: 20 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STA: +10 CHA: +15 WIS: +25 MANA: +100
SV FIRE: +10 SV DISEASE: +10 SV COLD: +10 SV MAGIC: +10 SV POISON: +10
Effect: Reviviscence (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 10.0) at Level 50
WT: 8.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: CLR
Race: HUM ERU HIE DEF DWF HFL GNM FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Water Sprinkler of Nem Ankh
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Lore Group: Cleric Epic Weapons
Slot: PRIMARY
Charges: Unlimited
Skill: 1H Blunt Atk Delay: 32
DMG: 20 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STA: +10 CHA: +15 WIS: +25 MANA: +100
SV FIRE: +10 SV DISEASE: +10 SV COLD: +10 SV MAGIC: +10 SV POISON: +10
Effect: Reviviscence (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 10.0) at Level 50
WT: 8.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: CLR
Race: HUM ERU HIE DEF DWF HFL GNM FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Blunt
Light:Stein of Tears
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Divine
Item Updated By:SoD-AB Deillusional
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-11-23 18:50:05
Page Updated:Fri Sep 11th, 2015

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 50
[Quests | Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Cleric Epic: Water Sprinkler of Nem Ankh

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Nedaria's Landing
Quest Name
Cleric Epic 1.5 Pre-Quest
Cleric Epic 1.5: Harmony of the Soul

Northern Felwithe
Quest Name
An Epic Request (Cleric)

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Timorous Deep
Lore Group: Cleric Epic Weapons
  • Aegis of Superior Divinity
  • Harmony of the Soul
  • Water Sprinkler of Nem Ankh

Water Sprinkler of Nem Ankh item window 2017

wrong info

# Feb 22 2010 at 12:40 AM Rating: Decent

Scholar
2,308 posts
This is not used in 1.5 prequest. You only get the prequest if you don't have this.
▲ Page top
wrong info
QuoteReply
# Feb 22 2010 at 2:37 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1661732332556
Guru
6,998 posts
The One and Only fcoty wrote:
This is not used in 1.5 prequest. You only get the prequest if you don't have this.


I hear this complaint every once in a while. We decided to list the epic 1.0's on the epic 1.5 prequests strictly because you only need the pre-quest if you don't have the item (so the item is relevant, albeit not used directly).

Edited, Feb 22nd 2010 12:39am by Fleven

▲ Page top
Epic is given at 35... the final word
QuoteReply
# Aug 19 2007 at 5:05 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760281234
7 posts
Helped my wife get her 1.0 for the 3rd time on a 3rd different server last week and we completed it at 27.... she went back every level to attempt the turn-in of the final Orb and found that the epic is granted at level 35, until then the Avatar of Water will "have no use for this". Now she's off getting her 1.0 on a 4th server.... Who plays 4 high elf clerics with the same name on 4 servers anyways? I think she needs help...
▲ Page top
Done
QuoteReply
# Jun 23 2007 at 11:07 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592308733708
3 posts
I can also confirm that this can be done at 41. You even get all the stats of the item at that level. Only thing you don't get is the click rez which you must wait til 50 for. Did this with the help of my 65 Ranger friend. Hardest parts were camping Lord Bergurgle and the 4 pearlescent frags in Skyfire and they weren't truly "hard" - just took awhile. We got this done in about 5 days.
▲ Page top
hmm
QuoteReply
# Jun 19 2007 at 10:22 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592289674074
155 posts
took 6 hours from A to Z
▲ Page top
Epic at 41
QuoteReply
# Jun 14 2007 at 9:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591942338378
5 posts
As of June 2007, I can confirm that all turn ins for the cleric epic can be done successfully at 41. If I had to guess, I would say the required level for the final turn in is 40, or perhaps 35. (I remember posts about people not being successful in the 20s range, but no other info between there and 46)

On the topic of epic quest level requirements, I was able to complete my warrior's 1.0 at lvl 33 (probably could have done earlier if I had decided to). At that time, I tried to do the "make it augmentable" quest turn in, but the quest guy would not accept the turn in. I went out and leveled up twice and tried again to make it augmentable, and it worked (this time at 35). So, this is why I suggest level 35 as a possible min level for the cleric final turn in.
▲ Page top
Epic at 41
QuoteReply
# Jun 22 2007 at 12:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591858547043
5 posts
I do not see how you could have done your war's 1.0 at 33, as you need to be 46 to go to hate and the hand of maestro is not MQ'able,( hand NEEDS to be turned in WITH the MARK) at least it was not for me when my friends BL (72) tried to turn in the hand, the npc promptly gave the hand back to her, but i went to hate on my bl (75) pulled hand to zone, killed hand, logged in war, looted and did turn in I had no problems continuing from there. I just completed war epic 1.0 on 6/22/07. Tried to MQ hand on 6/21/07 and it did NOT work.

Tails 75 Beastlord of Stromm
Assistme Ordie 48 Warrior
Senge 46 Cleric and soon to be wielder of my rez stick

▲ Page top
Completed in record time .... maybe =)
QuoteReply
# Apr 14 2007 at 10:08 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253641447
9 posts
Just completed epic with proof in hand on my 47 cleric 4/15/07. Almost got discouraged when i loked at the super long "to do" list but i stuck it out. About 12 hours total time from start to finish. The longest wait was the shards, which took me about 3 hours, I never want to see another Chromadrac for a long while.
Once you finish this it's a huge sigh of relief, makes you appreiciate it more once you got it and i was one of the fortunate ones. Safe hunting !!!



Edited, Apr 15th 2007 2:08am by lathon

QuoteReply
# Mar 06 2007 at 8:32 AM Rating: Decent
WickedLittleWoodElf
328 posts
OMG I waited for 17 hours for this guy -- I knew that when the zone started to fill with clerics he was going to pop soon!
Did my turn in, off to the next step.
Went to SF, turned in the stone & spawned the human. Lucky me I already had the box and didn't have to do the dragon kill so I gated out and got my pretty sparkly epic thing! YAY!!

Zordak Ragefire
QuoteReply
# Nov 26 2006 at 12:21 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591919652512
3 posts
You can camp this guy as long as you want, he's on a 24-hour spawn timer. My advice is just go do something worth your time like levelling, then just check back every now and then. I camped him for 7 hours straight then logged on the next day and he was up.
▲ Page top
Zordak Ragefire
QuoteReply
# Nov 26 2006 at 7:14 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592770530614
14 posts
I have been camping him in Sol B well not him actually just his ghost. Been there for 16 hours now and no pop anyone know the last time he spawned??
▲ Page top
No longer attainable bellow 50
QuoteReply
# Oct 14 2006 at 9:52 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591905838544
2 posts
FYI, all epic quests (1.0's) that require turn ins, don't know about combines, no longer work if you are under 50, maybe 46.

I recently completed the cleric epic up to turn in the three orbs to get the orb of the Triumvirate with all the orbs on the cleric, I do the turn in, get the OotT and hand it to the AoW.. "I have no need for this Sethros, you can have it back...WHAT!!?!?! the cleric is 17 and I know it was completable at any level before the SS expansion.

So I open up a ticket and ask if the quest is broken and i'll paraphrase the GM response " As this and all epic 1.0 quests where never intended to be completed below 46, you will only be able to do some but not all parts under these levels, continue to level up and when you are at the appropriate level, you can then turn it in for your reward"

Omat upon being hailed will always respawn the AoW for final turn in, looks like they got wise to us and changed the coding of the quest.
▲ Page top
No longer attainable bellow 50
QuoteReply
# Nov 30 2006 at 11:12 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591919652512
3 posts
I did this at level 40 very recently. However, I don't have TSS.
▲ Page top
Help for Clerics on Stromm
QuoteReply
# Aug 16 2006 at 3:29 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591900994278
40 posts
I have my mage camped right outside of the Overking's room...well in the hallway up the stairs... she can CotH your raid (or group) to that loc. You will not need a rogue to get to the King, mage is camped on the inside of the locked door. Pst or EQ email me in game and let me know when you need the help. My main is Jenxia. Please bring one pearl for each person you would like to have CotH'd as the CotH spell consumes a pearl with each casting and there is no vendor down there so my mage will eventually run out otherwise. This is a free service...for the good of Stromm.../hugs Jenxia
▲ Page top
Help for Clerics on Stromm
QuoteReply
# Nov 15 2006 at 6:02 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592295098220
View User Forum
4 posts
Aye you where a BIG help in getting my 1.0 =) I still have the log of you asking where the other peeps in my group where when you CoTH 2 clerics to take out the King and Queen I still think my Fav one was "OMG Yall are frigin crazy!" who says a cleric cant solo a few 1.0 mobs???? Ask the Overking ans Ragefire they took a knee b4 a single cleric with DA DB and BDA with VoV RK2 WUWU
▲ Page top
Help for Clerics on Stromm
QuoteReply
# Aug 26 2006 at 2:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1653869804268
16 posts
Hehe thanks for the free service while it lasts Jenx. Thats why Stromm rules.

Overking is soloable/groupable. As a 70 SK with resists in the mid 300's and the resistant disciple disc popped, I was blinded 90% of the battle. With DoN/DoDh gear (AC around 1900 for the fight) was being hit between 200-360 per swing. Best strat if your not going in with a full raid is clear the King's room one by one pet pulling, or, have some nasty dps and a tank pull the room and pop em off one by one.

Safest if you engage the King in his room at his spawn point so he doesnt have time to get into the Queen's room or upstairs and rain an aggro parade on your party.

fast completion
QuoteReply
# Jun 17 2006 at 7:29 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1639959435716
125 posts
My cleric just fnished this last night after only working on it for 7 days. My 70 bst main took down Ixiblat Fer with only 7 heals casted on her. Ragefire went down with a 70 pally friend with 3 clerics healing (too many IMO). She only needed a little help to finish this epic. All other fights were so easy it's not really worth mentioning except for the Overking. A 70 bst friend (really uber with 1k+ AA) with his shammy wife and his chanter friend shrouded as a kobold rogue along with a 70 warrior from my guild (there for his epic peice) easily took both the king and queen down.
▲ Page top
warder cecilia
QuoteReply
# May 23 2006 at 3:32 AM Rating: Decent
wpnldr
81 posts
Just got my epic tonight. when I hailed warder cecilia in skyfire she ave me the same box that zordak ragefire in naggy's lair gave me. the four slot container that's used to combine the pearlescent fragments. Since I had already combined the fragments in the box from zordak, I destroyed the box that cecilia gave me. It just threw me off when she gave me the box. Everything else went fine.

All epics pre-luclin are able to be completed prior to 51. This leaves beastlord and berzerker being the only ones with a 51 requirement for completion. used to not be so until a nerf beause they are so easy to solo.

To clear the level confusion
QuoteReply
# Aug 20 2006 at 10:28 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591840269006
148 posts
Actually, I have a level 46 berserker who has his epic, and i know many beastlords who did their epic level 46. The only reason my berserker has to wait until lvl 46 was so i could kill the Ireblind imp in Pofear. So No class to my knowledge with the exception of Rogue (has to wait till 50 for NPCs to talk to you) has to wait until any level to do it.

# Aug 25 2005 at 12:46 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591825662480
15 posts
For the record, NOBODY can do any epics anymore PRE 51.... some may be able to obtain some pieces, but turn ins and chats with NPC's cannot happen pre 51 anymore. this is my 3rd attemp at cleric epic, so i figure i can let ya'all in on what i found out....

# Oct 16 2005 at 12:42 PM Rating: Decent

148 posts
SINCE WHEN!?
nobody ever tested it. You are probobally doing soemthing wrong on your epic. People say the NPC's wont even talk to you... uhm i did first half of my cleric epic lvl 40. Its RECCOMMENDED that you do epic at lvl 50 because all the mobs you have to kill and stuff are high lvl and hard. epics came out what Kunark? level 50 was realy high lvl back then.. (might been max or was that 55?) so back then groups of lvl 50 was all you were gonna get so you would have wanted to be lvl 50.
